title: OncoMap Dataset
description: A public spatial-omics dataset of human cancer tissue (spatial transcriptomics or proteomics). See docs/OncoMap-SPEC.md §3.

id.description: Stable slug primary key, e.g. visium-brca-10x-2023-001

cancer_type.description: OncoTree code (primary). NCIt cross-map optional via cancer_type_ncit.

cancer_type_ncit.description: Optional NCIt code cross-mapping the OncoTree cancer_type.

platform.description: The spatial assay. Transcriptomics: st_array (the original spot-based Spatial Transcriptomics array, Stahl et al. 2016, precursor to Visium) through stereo_seq. Proteomics: codex/cycif/mxif/mihc = multiplexed antibody imaging, mibi/imc = mass-spectrometry imaging, orion = RareCyte Orion, geomx = NanoString GeoMx DSP.

sequencer.description: Sequencing instrument (GEO GPL / instrument_model), for sequencing-based platforms (Visium, Slide-seq, Stereo-seq, ST array). Distinct from `platform`, which is the spatial assay. Omit for imaging platforms (Xenium, MERFISH/MERSCOPE, CosMx).

accession.description: GEO / SRA / Zenodo / HTAN / ArrayExpress IDs. Required to reach verified status (enforced in build/validate.py, not schema).

reuse_notes.description: Format quirks, missing metadata, license caveats. Record dataset license here.

last_verified.description: ISO-8601 date the accession was last confirmed resolvable.

deposition_year.description: Year the dataset was deposited/released at its source repository (from the registry's release/publication date). Optional; used for growth-over-time stats.
